raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/XXXX I had auto accident with rim damage in XXXX, XXXX, which was covered by XXXX -American Express card. Before dropping of the car on XX/XX/XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX asked for additional deposit of {$2000.00} on top of {$400.00} already paid. 
Upon return to XXXX on XX/XX/XXXX I filed claim with American Express card submitted my statement and related documents for them initiate the claim. 
Since XX/XX/XXXX till now Amex has been investigating the claim/investigation and i have submitted all documents they needed, now suddenly i see {$2400.00} charge reappear in my statement without explanation, upon calling Amex I was told because i did not provide my current car insurance details, which i had already done but I resent again. so the partially credited the account for {$1000.00}, still we have open balace of {$1400.00} plues late fees and interest of {$91.00} which is unfair since Amex has failed to honor their XXXX policy. 
Please see 3 Amex letters enclosed here XXXX letter dated XX/XX/XXXX that dispute will be resolved with a month, now it took 8 months 2nd letter dtd XX/XX/XXXX said {$2000.00} charge investigation claim closed. 
XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX  charge claim closed. 

it does not give me any right to re- charge my amex for {$2400.00} after 8 months.
